description_long: This is a tall, narrow filing cabinet with a minimalist design, finished in a uniform beige color. The cabinet features three distinct drawers on the front, each with a flat, handle-less face, contributing to its sleek and modern appearance. The sides are plain and unadorned, while the back reveals the drawer mechanisms and internal structure. The cabinet stands on four black caster wheels, making it easily movable across flat surfaces. The overall construction appears to be made from laminated wood or MDF, with metal components for the drawer slides and wheels. Its compact form and neutral color make it suitable for use in contemporary office or urban environments.
description: A tall, beige filing cabinet with three handle-less drawers and four black caster wheels, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three flat, handle-less drawers and the cabinet's tall, narrow profile.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, unadorned panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the internal drawer mechanisms and the open back structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain panel and visible caster wheels.
